package.title: The Oberoi Himachal Experience — Royalty Reimagined

highlights.text: Two nights at The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla — colonial grandeur on the historic Mall Road
Three nights at Wildflower Hall, Mashobra — cedar forest sanctuary & infinity pool bliss
Private Kufri excursion with curated picnic amid Himalayan panoramas
Naldehra golf course heritage walk & Mashobra forest sanctuary trails
Oberoi spa rituals, forest picnics & bespoke fine dining experiences
Private luxury chauffeur with TRAGUIN 24/7 Oberoi concierge coordination

itinerary.title: The Oberoi Himachal Experience — Royalty Reimagined
itinerary.overview: Experience Himachal Pradesh through the lens of Oberoi hospitality — where colonial heritage meets cedar-forest sanctuary luxury. Two nights at The Oberoi Cecil in Shimla reveal Mall Road elegance, Viceregal Lodge grandeur, and Kufri alpine excursions. Three nights at Wildflower Hall in Mashobra offer infinity pool serenity, Naldehra golf heritage, forest sanctuary walks, and bespoke Oberoi spa rituals curated exclusively by TRAGUIN.
itinerary.seo_title: HP-014 | Oberoi Himachal Experience | TRAGUIN Ultra-Luxury Tour
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 05 Nights / 06 Days Himachal package (HP-014) at The Oberoi Cecil Shimla and Wildflower Hall Mashobra with Kufri, Naldehra, and Mashobra experiences. Ideal for luxury, romantic, and cultural travelers.

days.title: Arrival at The Oberoi Cecil, Shimla
days.description: Your Oberoi Himachal experience begins with a VIP TRAGUIN welcome at Chandigarh Airport or Kalka Railway Station. Ascend to Shimla and check into The Oberoi Cecil — a landmark of colonial elegance on the historic Mall Road with panoramic valley views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic Shivalik foothills drive, Timber Trail valley views en-route
Evening Experience: Oberoi welcome champagne and curated heritage orientation on Mall Road
Overnight Stay: Shimla — The Oberoi Cecil (Luxury Heritage Suite)
Meals Included: Oberoi welcome refreshment & fine dining dinner

days.title: Shimla Heritage & Kufri Excursion
days.description: After an Oberoi grand breakfast, explore Shimla's colonial legacy at the Viceregal Lodge, Christ Church, and The Ridge. Drive to Kufri for a private curated picnic amid alpine panoramas and pine forest trails.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Viceregal Lodge, The Ridge, Christ Church, Mall Road, Kufri Green Valley
Evening Experience: Private gourmet picnic setup at Kufri with Himalayan panorama views
Overnight Stay: Shimla — The Oberoi Cecil (Luxury Heritage Suite)
Meals Included: Oberoi breakfast, picnic lunch & fine dining dinner

days.title: Shimla to Wildflower Hall, Mashobra
days.description: Transfer to Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort — a cedar-forest sanctuary perched above Mashobra with sweeping Himalayan views. Settle into your luxury suite and enjoy an afternoon at the infinity pool overlooking snow-capped peaks.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mashobra cedar forest drive, Craignano Nature Park (optional)
Evening Experience: Oberoi infinity pool session and sunset aperitif on the terrace
Overnight Stay: Mashobra — Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort (Luxury Forest Suite)
Meals Included: Oberoi breakfast & bespoke fine dining dinner

days.title: Naldehra Golf & Mashobra Forest Sanctuary
days.description: Walk the historic Naldehra golf course — one of the oldest in India — lined with towering cedar trees. Explore Mashobra forest sanctuary trails on a guided nature walk before an Oberoi spa ritual and forest picnic lunch in a secluded cedar glade.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Naldehra golf course heritage walk, Mashobra forest sanctuary trails
Evening Experience: Oberoi signature spa ritual and private forest gourmet picnic
Overnight Stay: Mashobra — Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort (Luxury Forest Suite)
Meals Included: Oberoi breakfast, forest picnic lunch & fine dining dinner

days.title: Wildflower Hall Leisure & Wellness Day
days.description: A day of unhurried Oberoi luxury. Enjoy a morning yoga session on the terrace, explore the resort's private forest trails, indulge in a couples spa treatment, and savor a bespoke chef's tasting menu for your farewell evening.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private forest trail walk, Mashobra apple orchard visit (seasonal)
Evening Experience: Oberoi farewell chef's tasting menu with wine pairing on the terrace
Overnight Stay: Mashobra — Wildflower Hall, An Oberoi Resort (Luxury Forest Suite)
Meals Included: Oberoi breakfast & farewell tasting menu dinner

days.title: Wildflower Hall to Chandigarh / Departure
days.description: Enjoy a final Oberoi breakfast amid cedar forests before your private luxury vehicle transfers you to Chandigarh Airport or Kalka Railway Station with memories of Himalayan royalty reimagined.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury door-to-door station or airport drop-off
Meals Included: Oberoi grand buffet breakfast

inclusions.text: 05 nights at Oberoi-calibre luxury properties in Shimla and Mashobra
Daily Oberoi breakfasts and bespoke fine dining dinners (MAPAI plan)
Private chauffeur-driven luxury sedan for all transfers and sightseeing
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated elite guest relationship manager with Oberoi coordination
Private Kufri gourmet picnic setup and Mashobra forest picnic experience
Driver allowances, tolls, parking, fuel, and applicable taxes
Airfare or train tickets to and from Chandigarh / Kalka
Oberoi spa treatments, golf green fees, and premium wine pairings
Monument entry tickets and Viceregal Lodge camera permits
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, and tipping
